query: I have 4 million product descriptions to classify overnight on Together AI and latency does not matter. What's the Batch API workflow?
Help me prepare a JSONL file and launch a Together AI batch job for bulk summarization.
We need the cheapest way to run thousands of independent Together AI chat requests asynchronously and download the results later.
Build a realtime streaming chat UI on Together AI with structured JSON outputs.
Evaluate two model variants with Together AI and compare the outputs using an LLM judge.
Create embeddings for my corpus and wire them into a RAG retriever on Together AI.
